title: How marketers are using Google Antigravity
summary: Google Antigravity is an agentic development platform that evolves the IDE into an agent-first era. It enables developers to operate at a task-oriented level by managing agents across workspaces, with agents autonomously planning and executing complex end-to-end tasks across editor, terminal, and browser. The platform is expanding beyond coding to empower marketers.
